description: Correct-but-unoptimized PolyBench-style fixed-size integer bicg (s = A^T*r and q = A*p computed in one fused pass over the NxM matrix A, N=M=16). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the inner j-loop multiply-accumulate runs sequentially, leaving real PPA headroom. Pipelining the inner loop (#pragma HLS PIPELINE II=1) and partitioning A/p parallelizes the accumulates -> large latency drop without changing results. Demonstrator for the auto-derive throughput-target probe: NO throughput_target is hand-set.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
